_example_positive.name: Example Positive Trait
_example_positive.description: This is an example positive trait that costs points. Set available to true to enable.

_example_negative.name: Example Negative Trait
_example_negative.description: This is an example negative trait that grants points. Set available to true to enable.

camel.name: Camel
camel.description: Your body is remarkably efficient at retaining water. You get thirsty much slower than others.

desert_born.name: Desert Born
desert_born.description: Having grown up in scorching climates, you are immune to the increased thirst caused by hot temperatures.

parched.name: Perpetually Parched
parched.description: Your body burns through water at an alarming rate. You become thirsty much faster than normal.

cold_blooded.name: Cold Blooded
cold_blooded.description: You tolerate cold exceptionally well, taking reduced effects from frigid temperatures.

thick_skinned.name: Thick Skinned
thick_skinned.description: Your hardy constitution resists temperature extremes of all kinds.

thin_blooded.name: Thin Blooded
thin_blooded.description: Cold temperatures affect you more severely than others. Bundle up!

heat_sensitive.name: Heat Sensitive
heat_sensitive.description: You suffer more from hot temperatures than most people.

night_vision.name: Night Vision
night_vision.description: Your eyes are adapted to darkness. You can see clearly even in unlit rooms.

dark_adapted.name: Dark Adapted
dark_adapted.description: You function better in dim lighting conditions than most.

light_sensitive.name: Light Sensitive
light_sensitive.description: Bright daylight is uncomfortable for you, impairing your abilities.

night_blind.name: Night Blind
night_blind.description: You have difficulty seeing in darkness, suffering penalties in unlit areas.

blindness.name: Blindness
blindness.description: You cannot see. Room descriptions and entity details are hidden from you.

endurance.name: Endurance
endurance.description: Your body uses energy efficiently. Walking consumes less stamina than normal.

quick_recovery.name: Quick Recovery
quick_recovery.description: You recover stamina faster than others, bouncing back quickly from exertion.

marathoner.name: Marathoner
marathoner.description: Years of training have given you exceptional stamina. You use less and recover more.

light_footed.name: Light Footed
light_footed.description: You move with unusual grace. Difficult terrain is less taxing for you.

exhaustion_prone.name: Exhaustion Prone
exhaustion_prone.description: Physical activity tires you quickly. Walking consumes more stamina.

slow_recovery.name: Slow Recovery
slow_recovery.description: Your body takes longer to recover from exertion. Stamina regenerates slowly.

clumsy.name: Clumsy
clumsy.description: You struggle with rough terrain, expending extra effort to navigate obstacles.

deep_lungs.name: Deep Lungs
deep_lungs.description: Your lungs hold far more air than normal, allowing you to stay underwater much longer before needing to breathe.

aquatic_heritage.name: Aquatic Heritage
aquatic_heritage.description: Something in your bloodline grants an affinity for water. You recover breath rapidly after surfacing.

iron_lungs.name: Iron Lungs
iron_lungs.description: Your extraordinary respiratory system resists the crushing pressure of deep water. You hold breath longer, drain slower, and take less drowning damage.

shallow_breather.name: Shallow Breather
shallow_breather.description: Your lungs are small and inefficient. You run out of breath faster than most when submerged.

hydrophobic.name: Hydrophobic
hydrophobic.description: Water terrifies you. Submersion causes you to panic, draining breath faster, recovering slower, and taking more drowning damage.

venom_ward.name: Venom Ward
venom_ward.description: Your body naturally neutralizes toxins. Poison effects are significantly reduced.

toxin_tolerant.name: Toxin Tolerant
toxin_tolerant.description: Years of exposure have built up a moderate tolerance to poisons and venoms.

weak_constitution.name: Weak Constitution
weak_constitution.description: Your body is particularly susceptible to toxins. Poisons hit you harder than most.

hemophiliac.name: Hemophiliac
hemophiliac.description: Your blood does not clot properly, making you bleed more freely and leaving you vulnerable to blood-borne toxins.

mana_well.name: Mana Well
mana_well.description: A deep reservoir of arcane energy resides within you, granting a larger mana pool.

focused_mind.name: Focused Mind
focused_mind.description: Your mental discipline allows you to channel magical energy more efficiently, recovering mana faster.

spell_prodigy.name: Spell Prodigy
spell_prodigy.description: You have a natural gift for the arcane arts. Your spells strike with greater force.

arcane_savant.name: Arcane Savant
arcane_savant.description: A lifetime of magical study has made you exceptionally efficient. Your spells cost less mana and recover faster.

mana_stunted.name: Mana Stunted
mana_stunted.description: Your connection to arcane energy is weak. You have a noticeably smaller mana pool.

scattered_thoughts.name: Scattered Thoughts
scattered_thoughts.description: Your mind wanders easily, making it difficult to focus on channeling magical energy. Mana regeneration is sluggish.

arcane_dampening.name: Arcane Dampening
arcane_dampening.description: Something in your nature suppresses magical power. Your spells deal less damage and cost more to cast.

keen_edge.name: Keen Edge
keen_edge.description: You have a natural instinct for finding weak points. Your attacks land critical hits more often.

iron_hide.name: Iron Hide
iron_hide.description: Your skin is unusually tough, providing natural resistance to physical blows.

fast_healer.name: Fast Healer
fast_healer.description: Your body mends itself with remarkable speed. Wounds and injuries recover much faster.

dulled_reflexes.name: Dulled Reflexes
dulled_reflexes.description: Your reactions are slower than average, making it harder to land precise, critical strikes.

glass_jaw.name: Glass Jaw
glass_jaw.description: You bruise easily and your body is slow to recover from physical trauma. You take more damage and heal wounds slower.

efficient_metabolism.name: Efficient Metabolism
efficient_metabolism.description: Your body extracts every bit of nutrition from food. You get hungry much slower than others.

iron_stomach.name: Iron Stomach
iron_stomach.description: You can eat almost anything without ill effect. Spoiled or questionable food rarely makes you sick.

ravenous.name: Ravenous
ravenous.description: Your metabolism burns through food at an alarming rate. You are constantly hungry and more prone to food sickness.

vigorous.name: Vigorous
vigorous.description: You are blessed with exceptional vitality. You have more health and recover from injuries faster.

tough.name: Tough
tough.description: Your body can absorb punishment that would fell others. You have a significantly larger health pool.

frail.name: Frail
frail.description: Your body is weak and fragile. You have less health and recover from wounds more slowly.

sickly.name: Sickly
sickly.description: You are prone to illness and have a naturally weaker constitution. Less health and more susceptible to disease.

weatherproof.name: Weatherproof
weatherproof.description: Neither rain nor sleet nor snow can keep you down. You resist illness and recover from being drenched quickly.

hardy.name: Hardy
hardy.description: You endure harsh conditions better than most, shrugging off the effects of prolonged exposure.

exposure_prone.name: Exposure Prone
exposure_prone.description: Your body struggles to cope with environmental extremes. Prolonged exposure affects you more severely.

delicate.name: Delicate
delicate.description: Your immune system is fragile. You catch illness easily and take longer to dry off when soaked.

quick_study.name: Quick Study
quick_study.description: You pick up new skills faster than most, gaining additional experience from practice and training.

prodigy.name: Prodigy
prodigy.description: You are a natural talent with an extraordinary capacity for learning. Skill experience gains are greatly increased.

slow_learner.name: Slow Learner
slow_learner.description: New concepts don't come easily to you. It takes significantly more practice to improve your skills.

shadow_born.name: Shadow Born
shadow_born.description: Darkness clings to you like a cloak. You are naturally adept at moving unseen and unheard.

silent_step.name: Silent Step
silent_step.description: Your footfalls make barely a whisper. You move with a quiet grace that aids in staying hidden.

conspicuous.name: Conspicuous
conspicuous.description: Something about you draws attention. Whether it's your build, your manner, or just bad luck, stealth does not come naturally.

heavy_footed.name: Heavy Footed
heavy_footed.description: You move with all the subtlety of a charging bull. Your footsteps echo and your presence is hard to conceal.
